**Gual Periok** is a state constituency in [Kelantan](/wiki/Kelantan "Kelantan"), [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"), that has been represented in the [Kelantan State Legislative Assembly](/wiki/Kelantan_State_Legislative_Assembly "Kelantan State Legislative Assembly").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

The state constituency was first contested in 1974 and is mandated to return a single Assemblyman to the Kelantan State Legislative Assembly under the [first-past-the-post voting system](/wiki/First-past-the-post_voting "First-past-the-post voting").

## Demographics

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Gual_Periok&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Demographics")]

As of 2020, Gual Periok has a population of 41,770 people.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

Ethnic breakdown of Gual Periok's electorate as of 2023[[3]](#cite_note-3)

1. [Malay](/wiki/Malaysian_Malay "Malaysian Malay") (97.0%)
2. Other ethnicities (1.76%)
3. [Chinese](/wiki/Malaysian_Chinese "Malaysian Chinese") (1.17%)
4. [Indian](/wiki/Malaysian_Indians "Malaysian Indians") (0.09%)
